mapper.insert: INSERT INTO member_tbl1 (member_id, member_pw, member_name, member_grade, member_nickname, member_email, member_thumb, enroll_date, member_status, manner_score, trade_count) VALUES (#{memberId}, #{memberPw}, #{memberName}, 2, #{memberNickname}, #{memberEmail}, #{memberThumb}, SYSDATE, 1, 0, 0)
mapper.select: select member_id from member_tbl1 where member_email = #{memberEmail} fetch first 1 row only
select member_id, member_name, member_email, enroll_date, member_grade, member_status from member_tbl1
mapper.update: update member_tbl set member_name=#{memberName}, member_nickname=#{memberNickname}, member_email=#{memberEmail} where member_id=#{memberId}
mapper.select: select member_pw from member_tbl1 where member_id =#{memberId}
mapper.update: update member_tbl1 set member_pw=#{memberPw} where member_id = #{memberId}
update member_tbl1 set member_thumb=#{memberThumb} where member_id = #{memberId}
